title: Account Management
shortSummary: Winning the deal is just the beginning. Learn to expand accounts through upsell, cross-sell, and renewals — where the real revenue compounds.
whyItMatters: It costs 5-7x more to acquire a new customer than to expand an existing one. The best AEs don't just close and move on — they build long-term relationships that compound revenue. Account management is about understanding your customer's evolving needs, delivering consistent value, and positioning yourself as an indispensable partner.
coreConcepts: Customer success handoff and relationship continuity
Quarterly business reviews (QBRs) that drive expansion
Mutual success planning to protect renewals
Net Revenue Retention (NRR) and its impact on your comp
Building a referral engine from happy customers
